notes: Extracted from the 'MU' sheet. Ub2 (Standard's Accuracy) and Ub5 (Repeatability) are not part of the original reference-doc plan (which only specified u_std/u_res/u_hys/u_zero/u_temp/u_head) — this file's actual model uses six Type B components, no u_temp or u_head component observed. Confirm with Charkha whether u_temp/u_head are meant to be added for other pressure scopes (e.g. liquid medium) or are genuinely not used.

type_a.description: Standard deviation of the mean error across repeated readings at each point.

type_b_sources.name: u_repeatability
type_b_sources.input_source: readings, computed as stdev of successive differences

type_b_sources.name: u_hys
type_b_sources.input_source: readings.hysteresis, max abs difference between ascending and descending at any point

acceptance_scope_table.note: Found embedded in the source file (sheet 'MU', column O). This may partially satisfy the 'acceptance limits' requirement for Pressure specifically — confirm with Charkha before seeding acceptance_limits from this rather than waiting on a separate file.
